profile.name: flashsim-event-small
profile.description: Original small Flash-Sim event-runtime geometry/timing used for GC-pressure validation.

notes: Flash-Sim and MQSim sectors are both 64 B.
This case is full-page aligned and avoids partial sector bitmaps.
MQSim external traces may include a write warmup prefix to mirror Flash-Sim preconditioning.
